description.one_line: The direct and irreverent commentator who isn't afraid to be blunt.
description.full: The direct and irreverent commentator who isn't afraid to be blunt.

usage_guidance.when_to_use: Brainstorming, irreverent commentary, quick pattern matching.
usage_guidance.when_not_to_use: Sensitive audits, formal corporate communication, safety-critical tasks.
usage_guidance.context_considerations: Large context, focuses on 'real-time' feeling data.

differentiation.context_handling: Large context, focuses on 'real-time' feeling data.
differentiation.truth_vs_speed: Ultra-fast, truth is filtered through wit.
differentiation.product_vs_model: Integrated deeply with the X platform.
